title: Wild Flowers
body:
## Basics
Wild Flowers is a simple mod adding a few uniqe plants into the game. All the plants will spawn naturaly in your wolrd, with the intent for them not to be overbearing. 
## Compatibility
Some plants have compatibility with other existing world gen mods. Those plants that do will naturaly spawn in expected biomes. 
## Mechanics
Some plants also have more mechanics to them. Such as only being obtainable by growing them yourself. While others shears can be used to get their petals or the flower itself. 
## Generation
You will find most of the plants this mod adds above ground in troppical enviorments. With a few others spawning through out the world, and one of them even spawning underground. If you can find it.
